summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Production Planning feature with Add Plan dialog and cascading SKU filters. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows tested successfully including cascading filters and plan creation.

issues: Minor console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - React hydration warning in SKU dropdown

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby attribute (accessibility warning)
seed_data_creation: Created test production plans for SKU FC_KS_BE_115 in Unit 1 Vedica branch for dates 2025-01-25, 2025-02-15, 2025-02-20, 2025-03-15
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production Planning feature fully tested. POST /api/production-plans endpoint creates plans with auto-derived plan_month from date. Cascading SKU filters work correctly: Vertical -> Model -> Brand. 306 SKUs available for Unit 1 Vedica branch. When Scooter vertical selected with Blaze model, filters down to 103 SKUs.

features_tested.post_production_plans_api: PASS - Creates production plan with sku_id, branch, date, planned_quantity
features_tested.post_production_plans_update_existing: PASS - Updates existing plan for same SKU/branch/date
features_tested.get_production_plans_by_branch: PASS - Returns plans filtered by branch
features_tested.get_production_plans_by_month: PASS - Returns plans filtered by plan_month
features_tested.get_production_plans_structure: PASS - Response has correct fields (id, branch, plan_month, date, sku_id, planned_quantity, created_at)
features_tested.get_available_months: PASS - Returns list of months with plans
features_tested.get_filter_options: PASS - Returns verticals for cascading filters
features_tested.get_models_by_vertical: PASS - Returns models for selected vertical
features_tested.get_shortage_analysis: PASS - Returns shortage report for plan month
features_tested.delete_production_plan_month: PASS - Deletes all plans for a month
features_tested.production_planning_page_loads: PASS - Page loads with title, month selector, tabs
features_tested.add_plan_button: PASS - Opens Add Production Plan dialog
features_tested.add_plan_dialog_vertical_filter: PASS - Vertical dropdown with cascading behavior
features_tested.add_plan_dialog_model_filter: PASS - Model dropdown updates based on vertical
features_tested.add_plan_dialog_brand_filter: PASS - Brand dropdown updates based on vertical+model
features_tested.add_plan_dialog_sku_count_updates: PASS - SKU count updates from 306 to 103 when filters applied
features_tested.add_plan_dialog_sku_select: PASS - SKU dropdown shows filtered SKUs
features_tested.add_plan_dialog_submit: PASS - Creates plan and shows success toast
features_tested.plan_details_tab: PASS - Shows created plan with date, SKU ID, planned quantity
